task.title: Skip directives for markdown formatting
task.description:
Repository: astral-sh/ruff
Issue #22637

Blacken docs uses HTML comments: https://github.com/adamchainz/blacken-docs/#markdown

Do we want something different? Should we support blacken docs' directives?

rating.rationale: Agent produced an EXECUTION_ERROR with no output, no communication, and no partial work. A low-complexity research/design task should at minimum yield a comment or HANDOFF.md explaining the blocker. Total failure to deliver anything actionable.
